title: 🧩subworkflow - aws update cloudformation stack
description:
Subworkflow to update an aws cloudformation stack

This subworkflow provides an easy way to trigger
an update of an existing aws cloudformation stack with

Parameters:

cf_stackname: (Required) stackname of the cloudformation stack you want to create
cfyamls3url: (Required) is the cloudformation yaml to run (needs to be stored on s3 and entered using the following url syntax https://s3bucket.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/cf.yaml)
awsregion: (Required) region in which you want to create the cloudformation stack
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) the connection name of the Dynatrace OIDC Connection
assumerolearn: (Required) arn of a role that allows the update of the cloudformation stack

This subworkflow Needs subworkflow "subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution"

Subworkflow will wait for ssm document execution and will fail if ssm document fails

This subworkflow uses the out of the box AWS SSM Document: AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack
https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/documents/AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack/description?region=us-east-1
guide:
## 🔄 **Subworkflow to Update an AWS CloudFormation Stack**

📦 This subworkflow provides a simple and controlled way to **trigger an update of an existing AWS CloudFormation stack** using AWS Systems Manager (SSM).

It is commonly used to apply **infrastructure changes, configuration updates, or template enhancements** in a standardized and automated way.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **cf_stackname** (Required): 🏷️ The name of the CloudFormation stack to update.  
- **cfyamls3url** (Required): 📄 The S3 URL of the CloudFormation YAML template to apply  
  *(must follow this format: `https://s3bucket.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/cf.yaml`)*  
- **awsregion** (Required): 🌍 The AWS region where the CloudFormation stack resides.  
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 The name of the Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection used to authenticate with AWS.  
- **assumerolearn** (Required): 🎭 The ARN of an IAM role that allows updating the CloudFormation stack.

---

### ⏳ **Execution Behavior**

⏱️ The subworkflow waits for the AWS Systems Manager (SSM) document execution to complete.  
❌ If the SSM document execution fails, this subworkflow will also fail, enabling **restart-on-error** handling in the parent workflow.

---

### 📘 **AWS SSM Document Used**

This subworkflow uses the out-of-the-box AWS Systems Manager document:

🔗 https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager/documents/AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack/description?region=us-east-1

---

### 🧠 **Workflow Logic**

- 📤 The subworkflow sends an update command to the AWS SSM document  
  **`AWS-UpdateCloudFormationStack`**
- ⏳ It waits for the SSM document execution to complete
- ✅ The execution result is validated to confirm the stack update was successful
- ❌ If the update fails, the subworkflow fails to allow **restart-on-error** behavior in the parent workflow

---

This subworkflow Needs subworkflow  
**subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution**

---
